text.name: sysdescription
text.text: The FM-7 ("Fujitsu Micro 7") is a home computer created by Fujitsu. It was first released in 1982 and was sold in Japan and Spain. It is a stripped-down version of Fujitsu's earlier FM-8 computer, and during development it was referred to as the "FM-8 Jr.".

text.name: sysdescription
text.text: El FM-7 ("Fujitsu Micro 7") es un ordenador doméstico creado por Fujitsu. Salió al mercado en 1982 y se vendió en Japón y España. Se trata de una versión reducida del anterior ordenador FM-8 de Fujitsu, y durante su desarrollo se le denominó "FM-8 Jr".
